headline: General Dynamics Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points Amid Iran War Sell-Off
summary: HCA Healthcare, TJX trade near buy zones. General Dynamics closes in on entry. Dividend plays AT&T, Equinix among stocks to watch.
